data.title: 国际服活动常驻化「Special Summer Mission! RABBIT SQUAD and the Mystery of the Missing Shrimp」

data.body:
[Immortalized Event Notice]

The Event Story, Special Summer Mission! RABBIT SQUAD and the Mystery of the Missing Shrimp, has been immortalized today, so you can play it anytime!

Log in now to check it out, Sensei!
